Name: Hero's Medal
Description: The Pokémon VMAX this card is attached to gets -100 HP, and if it is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, that player takes 1 fewer Prize card. You can't attach this card to a Pokémon VMAX that has 100 HP or less remaining.

Name: Memory Capsule
Description: The Pokémon this card is attached to can use any attack from its previous Evolutions. (You still need the necessary Energy to use each attack.)

Name: Telescopic Sight
Description: The attacks of the Pokémon this card is attached to do 30 more damage to your opponent's Benched Pokémon V and Benched Pokémon-GX.
